name: Wave 1: core runtime authority / workflow_runtime / batch 1
description: Small focused packet for 3 open bug(s). Uses auto/* routing so Praxis can choose lower-cost admitted models where suitable.
outcome_goal: Drive BUG-4C7E2290, BUG-AF7C1773, BUG-D74C9598 to proof-backed terminal outcomes or leave explicit blockers in CLOSEOUT.md.

token_policy.default_model_routing: explicit lower-cost openai/gpt-5.4-mini for plan/verify/contained packets; openai/gpt-5.4 only for core authority execution
token_policy.strong_model_only_when: authority design or invasive implementation genuinely requires it

anti_requirements: Do not widen beyond listed bug IDs.
Do not resolve FIXED without validates_fix evidence.
Do not use ad hoc SQL for bug status or evidence writes.
Do not create wrapper scripts for behavior that belongs in runtime, registry, event bus, or DB authority.
Use praxis workflow discover before implementing new code or patterns.

jobs.label: Plan workflow_runtime packet
jobs.prompt:
Orient from Praxis.db standing orders first. Then use praxis workflow discover/recall as needed to plan this packet.

Bugs in scope:
- BUG-4C7E2290 [P1/ARCHITECTURE]: praxis_wave and workflow_chain split wave authority between in-memory state and Postgres
- BUG-AF7C1773 [P1/RUNTIME]: praxis_wave start reports a running wave but observe from a fresh process shows no waves
- BUG-D74C9598 [P1/WIRING]: [hygiene-2026-04-22/worker-concurrency] Compose default bypasses resource-derived worker concurrency

Write Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-1-core-authority-workflow-runtime-1/PLAN.md with: authority model, files to read, files allowed to change, verification path, stop boundary, and per-bug intended outcome. Do not edit code in this job.

jobs.label: Execute workflow_runtime packet
jobs.prompt:
Read Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-1-core-authority-workflow-runtime-1/PLAN.md first. Implement the smallest durable fix or document a proof-backed DEFERRED/WONT_FIX outcome.

Bugs in scope:
- BUG-4C7E2290 [P1/ARCHITECTURE]: praxis_wave and workflow_chain split wave authority between in-memory state and Postgres
- BUG-AF7C1773 [P1/RUNTIME]: praxis_wave start reports a running wave but observe from a fresh process shows no waves
- BUG-D74C9598 [P1/WIRING]: [hygiene-2026-04-22/worker-concurrency] Compose default bypasses resource-derived worker concurrency

Rules: use praxis workflow discover before new code; keep writes inside the active Praxis workspace boundary; do not cross Coder/Recruiter boundaries; do not resolve bugs in this job. Write Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-1-core-authority-workflow-runtime-1/EXECUTION.md with changed files, evidence collected, and intended terminal status per bug.

jobs.label: Verify and resolve workflow_runtime packet
jobs.prompt:
Read Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-1-core-authority-workflow-runtime-1/PLAN.md and Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-1-core-authority-workflow-runtime-1/EXECUTION.md. Run the narrowest meaningful verifier. Use only praxis workflow bugs attach_evidence and praxis workflow bugs resolve for bug state.

Bugs in scope:
- BUG-4C7E2290 [P1/ARCHITECTURE]: praxis_wave and workflow_chain split wave authority between in-memory state and Postgres
- BUG-AF7C1773 [P1/RUNTIME]: praxis_wave start reports a running wave but observe from a fresh process shows no waves
- BUG-D74C9598 [P1/WIRING]: [hygiene-2026-04-22/worker-concurrency] Compose default bypasses resource-derived worker concurrency

If verification fails, leave the bug open and record the blocker. Write Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-1-core-authority-workflow-runtime-1/CLOSEOUT.md with proof, commands, status outcome, and unresolved risks.
